description:
Implement reflection loop from education/005.

Trigger reflection:
- After completing each aim (immediate)
- End of each work session (periodic)
- Every N hours of active work (time-based)

Reflection prompt:
```
Reflect on your recent work:
1. Context: What were you trying to achieve?
2. Outcome: What actually happened?
3. Effectiveness: How well did your approach work?
4. Lesson: What would you do differently next time?
5. Pattern: Does this relate to past experiences?
```

Store as:
- New field in aim schema: `reflections: Reflection[]`
- OR separate `.bowman/reflections/` directory
- Link to aims worked on

Use reflections:
- Inform strategy adjustments
- Build pattern library
- Improve future work quality

status.comment: Implemented reflection pattern: (1) Extended Aim schema with Reflection type and reflections array in shared/types.ts, (2) Added addReflection tRPC endpoint in backend/routers/aim.ts, (3) Updated all aim creation points to initialize reflections: [], (4) Fixed frontend type errors in list-store.ts, (5) Updated INSTRUCT.md with reflection guidance (when/how to reflect), (6) Added addReflection MCP tool in mcp/tools.ts, (7) Built all packages. Infrastructure complete - agents can now record structured reflections on completed aims.
